Class-Fighter 20 — Female Human Fighter: 20
Strength: 12 (+1) Dexterity: 18 (+4) Constitution: 14 (+2) Intelligence: 13 (+1) Wisdom: 11 (+0) Charisma: 16 (+3)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Evil Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 3; Dexterity: 1; Strength: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 408966/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 180/360
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Truesight: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Ability Boosts: 7 to distribute
Tactical Mind: Can add 1d10 to a failed ability check, expending a use of Second Wind if the result is a success
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; Fighting Style: 2; General: 7; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighter Primary Ability): 1; Fighter (Fighter Subclass): 1; Fighter (Maneuver): 9
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Archery; Boon Of The Night Spirit; Boon Of Truesight; Defense; Great Weapon Fighting; Magic Initiate (Druid); Savage Attacker; Skilled; Two-Weapon Fighting Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Fighter Features: Action Surge; Additional Fighting Style; Ambush; Arcane Charge; Armor Training (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Bait And Switch; Battle Master; Bulwark Of Force; Champion; Combat Superiority; Commander's Strike; Commanding Presence; Disarming Attack; Distracting Strike; Eldritch Knight; Eldritch Strike; Epic Boon; Evasive Footwork; Extra Attack; Feinting Attack; Fighter Primary Ability; Fighter Subclass; Fighting Style; Goading Attack; Guarded Mind; Heroic Warrior; Improved Combat Superiority; Improved Critical; Improved War Magic; Indomitable; Know Your Enemy; Lunging Attack; Maneuvering Attack; Menacing Attack; Parry; Precision Attack; Psi Warrior; Psionic Power; Pushing Attack; Rally; Relentless; Remarkable Athlete; Riposte; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion; Perception, Survival); Spellcasting; Strength; Student Of War; Studied Attacks; Superior Critical; Survivor; Sweeping Attack; Tactical Assessment; Tactical Master; Tactical Mind; Tactical Shift; Telekinetic Adept; Telekinetic Master; Three Extra Attacks; Trip Attack; Two Extra Attacks; Ultimate Combat Superiority; War Bond; War Magic; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Additional Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Fighter Primary Ability: 1 selection
Fighter Subclass: 1 selection
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Telekinetic Adept: Has Psi-Powered Leap and Telekinetic Thrust features
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +10 Insight: (wis) +6 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +6 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +7 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +7
Athletics: (str) +7 Medicine: (wis) +0 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +7 Stealth: (dex) +4
History: (int) +7 Perception: (wis) +0 Survival: (wis) +0
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Animal Handling; Arcana; Athletics; History; Insight; Nature; Perception, Survival; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex); Tinker's Tools: (dex)
Languages: Common; Deep Speech; Draconic
Skill Notes:
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Student Of War: Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools)/Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, Perception, Survival)
Ambush: Can spend a superiority die to add the roll to a Stealth check
Boon Of Truesight: Has 60' Truesight
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Commanding Presence: Can spend a superiority die to add the roll to an Intimidation, Performance, or Persuasion check
Remarkable Athlete: Has advantage on Athletics
Tactical Assessment: Can spend a superiority die to add the roll to a History, Insight, or Investigation check
Combat
Hit Points: 119 Initiative: +10 Armor Class: 18
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Splint Shield: None Weapons: Greataxe (+7 1d12+1 S; Cleave); Greatsword (+7 2d6+1 S; Graze); Heavy Crossbow (+10 1d10+4 P R100/400; Push); Unarmed Strike (+7 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +40
Defense: +1 Armor Class in armor
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +4
Improved Combat Superiority: Superiority dice increase to d10
Improved War Magic: Has increased War Magic effects
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Survivor: Has the Defy Death and Heroic Rally features
Three Extra Attacks: Has increased Extra Attack effects
Two Extra Attacks: Has increased Extra Attack effects
Ultimate Combat Superiority: Superiority dice increase to d12
Action Surge: Can take an extra non-magic action 2 times per short rest
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Ambush: Can spend a superiority die to add the roll to initiative
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Bait And Switch: Can spend a superiority die to swap places with an adjacent willing creature and to boost the Armor Class of either self or the other creature by the rolled value until the start of the next turn
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Can use a bonus action to become invisible in dim or no light; taking an action, bonus action, or reaction ends
Bulwark Of Force: R30' Can use a bonus action to give 1 target half cover for 1 min once per long rest; can spend Psionic Energy dice for additional uses
Combat Superiority: Can use a d12 superiority die to perform one of 9 chosen maneuvers 6 times per short rest
Commander's Strike: Can use a superiority die and forego an attack to direct an ally to attack; the ally uses a reaction to attack and adds the superiority die to its damage
Disarming Attack: Can add a superiority die to damage and cause the target to drop an item (save DC 18 Strength negates)
Distracting Strike: Can add a superiority die to damage and give advantage to the next ally attack against the same foe before the start of the next turn
Eldritch Strike: Successful attack inflicts disadvantage on the first save vs. a self spell before the end of the next turn
Evasive Footwork: Can use bonus action and spend a superiority die to Disengage, adding a the roll to Armor Class until the start of the next turn
Extra Attack: Can make 4 attacks during an Attack action
Feinting Attack: Can use a bonus action and expend a superiority die to gain advantage on an attack and add the roll to its damage
Goading Attack: Can add a superiority die to damage and inflict disadvantage on the target's attacks on others (save DC 18 Wisdom negates) until the end of the next turn
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Heroic Rally: Regains 7 hit points each rd when between 1 and 59 hit points
Heroic Warrior: Can give self Heroic Inspiration at the start of each turn
Improved Critical: Scores a critical hit on a natural 19
Know Your Enemy: Knows how foe compares to self after 1 min study once per long rest; can expend a superiority die for additional uses
Lunging Attack: Can use a bonus action and spend a superiority die to Dash and add the roll to the damage from a subsequent attack during the same turn
Maneuvering Attack: Can add a superiority die to damage and allow an ally to use a reaction to move half its Speed without provoking an opportunity attack from the target
Menacing Attack: Can add a superiority die to damage and inflict frightened (save DC 18 Wisdom negates) until the end of the next turn
Parry: Can use a reaction and expend a superiority die to subtract the roll + 4 from a foe's melee damage to self
Precision Attack: Can add a superiority die to an attack
Pushing Attack: Can add a superiority die to damage and push the Large or smaller target 15' (save DC 18 Strength negates)
Rally: R30' Can expend a superiority die to give a target the roll + 10 temporary hit points
Relentless: Can use a d8 instead of a superiority die for a maneuver once per turn
Remarkable Athlete: Has advantage on initiative and can move 15' after scoring a critical hit without provoking opportunity attacks
Riposte: After a foe melee miss, can use a reaction and spend a superiority die to attack and add the roll to its damage
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+20 hit points 4 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Studied Attacks: Missed attack gives advantage on the next attack on the same target before the end of the next turn
Superior Critical: Scores a critical hit on a natural 18
Sweeping Attack: After a successful melee attack, can expend a superiority die to inflict the roll HP on a second adjacent foe
Tactical Master: Can use a mastery weapon to Push, Sap, or Slow
Tactical Shift: Using Second Wind allows moving 15' without provoking opportunity attacks
Trip Attack: Can add a superiority die to damage and knock the Large or smaller target prone (save DC 18 Strength negates)
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
War Bond: Cannot be disarmed from a bonded weapon and can use a bonus action to summon one
War Magic: Can use a bonus action to make a weapon attack after casting a spell
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 6 chosen kinds of simple or martial melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +8; Dexterity: +4; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +7; Wisdom: +0
Save Notes:
Boon Of The Night Spirit: In dim or no light, has resistance to all damage other than psychic and radiant
Defy Death: Has advantage on death saves, and a roll of 18-19 on a death save gains the benefits of a 20
Guarded Mind: Has resistance to psychic damage/Can spend 1 Psionic Energy die to end charmed and frightened conditions
Indomitable: Can reroll a failed save, adding a +20 bonus, 3 times per long rest
Magic
Spell Slots: W0: 3; W1: 4; W2: 3; W3: 3; W4: 1 Attack: C: +6; D: +6; Fighter: +7; W: +7 Spell DC: C: 14; D: 14; Fighter: 15; W: 15
Spells: Telekinesis (Fighter5 [Telekinetic Master] Tran): R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Magic Notes:
Arcane Charge: Can teleport 30' during Action Surge
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the Wizard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Telekinetic Master: Can cast Telekinesis and use bonus actions while concentrating to make a weapon attack each rd once per long rest; can spend Psionic Energy dice for additional uses
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 11 available vs. 25 allocated
